name: bendusy--mlx-local-inference
description: Full local AI inference stack on Apple Silicon Macs via MLX. Includes: LLM chat (Qwen3-14B, Gemma3-12B), speech-to-text ASR (Qwen3-ASR, Whisper), text embeddings (Qwen3-Embedding 0.6B/4B), OCR (PaddleOCR-VL), TTS (Qwen3-TTS), and an automatic transcription daemon with LLM correction. All models run locally via MLX with OpenAI-compatible APIs. Use when the user needs local AI capabilities: text generation, speech recognition, embeddings/vector search, OCR, text-to-speech, or batch audio transcription — without cloud API calls.
